_meta.title: BSV Desktop - Your Keys, Your Identity, Your Desktop
_meta.description: BSV Desktop is a free, open source BSV Blockchain wallet for Windows, macOS, and Linux with built-in identity, micropayments, and an app catalog.
hero.subtitle: Wallet. Identity. App catalog. All on your machine.
features.heading: Three Things No Other Wallet Does
features.subtitle: Self-custodial keys, cryptographic identity, and a live app catalog in one download.
feature.brc100.title: Works With Any BRC-100 App
feature.brc100.desc: Full implementation of the open wallet standard. Connect to any compliant application out of the box — no plugins, no vendor lock-in.
feature.keys.title: Your Keys, Your Machine
feature.keys.desc: Self-custodial from the first launch. Wallet keys stay on your device, protected by AES-256-GCM encryption and strict access permissions.
feature.identity.title: Prove Who You Are, Nothing More
feature.identity.desc: Cryptographic identity certificates let you share exactly what an app needs. Verify your age without revealing your birthday.
showcase.heading: Built for Builders and Users Alike
showcase.desc: BSV Desktop puts the full power of the BSV Blockchain in a native app. Browse the app catalog, manage multiple profiles, and send payments — all from one interface.
showcase.spec1: Full BRC-100 Wallet Interface — all 28 methods
showcase.spec3: Selective data revelation through identity certificates
showcase.spec5: Auditable key linkage proofs for privacy and accountability
showcase.spec6: Named baskets for fine-grained output and permission control
